creator: joe@zircon.seattle.wa.us
text:
Wesley Shields wrote:
> This port is no longer fetchable - it appears a new version was put out
> that replaced the one in this port.  Can you please update this shar to
> reflect any necessary changes?
>
>   
This appears to be the usual att research problem.  Network changes at 
att often interrupt the ability of anyone from the outside to access the 
inside.  There has been no announcement of anything different in the 
distribution status of any software.

This is also a potential problem with the beta status in that it may be 
withdrawn at any time.  That is exactly why I put that long explanation 
of the issue at the start of the Makefile.  I personally have no control 
of access to any files on any research.att.com site anywhere.  I only 
make this port available as a hopefully useful service during the brief 
time period where a beta port may or may not be available.

There are no changes I can make to fix this issue.  Either publish the 
port as I submitted it or do not publish it.  I cannot produce or 
withdraw any files on any att site anywhere.  It either works or it doesn't.

When all else fails, try emailing gsf@research.att.com and ask him 
questions.

/Joe
